zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy於1450年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特時，他的父親William Peter de Pierrepont Empson, Knight Sir32歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Joseph33歲。他於1462年與Jane de Plumpton在英國英格蘭艾可萊特爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1442年住在英國英格蘭米德萊可。他去世於1510年8月17日在英國米德萊可享年60歲，埋葬在英國倫敦特福利亞斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy于1450年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特时，他的父亲William Peter de Pierrepont Empson, Knight Sir32岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Joseph33岁。他于1462年与Jane de Plumpton在英国英格兰艾可萊特爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1442年住在英国英格兰米德萊可。他去世于1510年8月17日在英国米德萊可享年60岁，埋葬在英国倫敦特福利亞斯。

nameMeanings.name: Empson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: metronymic meaning ‘son of Emma’, from the Middle English female personal name Em(e), Emme (see Imm ) + -son.
shortened form of Emerson . The two names were no doubt confused, and it is possible that the reverse process sometimes occurred, whereby Em(m)erson was an altered form of Emmeson, i.e. Em(p)son.

variants.name: Imeson
meanings: English: variant either of Emmeson (see Empson ) or of Emerson .

variants.name: Impson
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of   Empson  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US than in Britain.

variants.name: Imm
meanings: German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Im(m)o, a pet form of names based on Irmin-, a divine or ethnic name formed with irmin, ermen ‘whole, entire’.

English (Wiltshire): from the ancient Germanic female personal name Imma, Emma, of the same origin as in 1 above. In Old English Imma, Emma was borne by both males and females. In Middle English, under Norman influence, the personal name Emm(a), Imm(a) came to be used almost exclusively for women, being taken as a short form of Ermingard.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy was born in 1450, in Towcester, Northamptonshire, England, his father, William Peter de Pierrepont Empson, Knight Sir, was 32 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Joseph, was 33. He married Jane de Plumpton in 1462, in Writtle, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom in 1442. He died on 17 August 1510, in Middlesex, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Whitefriars, London, England.

Il a épousé Jane de Plumpton en 1462, à Writtle, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1442. Il est décédé le 17 août 1510, à Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Whitefriars, Londres, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchyが1450年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアトウセスターで生まれた時，父William Peter de Pierrepont Empson, Knight Sirは32歳，母Lady Elizabeth Josephは33歳であった。1462年にイギリスイギリスエセックスウリットルでJane de Plumptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1442年にはイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスに住んでいた。彼は1510年8月17日にイギリスミッドレセックスで60歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンウィテフリアルズにて埋葬された。

ko.Easton on the Hill, East Northamptonshir: 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 이스트  테 힐
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy(이)가 1450년 영국 노르섬프토실르 타우스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Peter de Pierrepont Empson, Knight Sir(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Joseph(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1462년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀에서 Jane de Plumpton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1442년도에 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 살았다. 그는 1510년 8월 17일 영국 미들레세스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던 휘테프리아르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy nasceu em 1450, em Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Peter de Pierrepont Empson, Knight Sir, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Joseph, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane de Plumpton em 1462, em Writtle, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1442. Ele faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1510, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Whitefriars, London, Inglaterra.

ru.Easton on the Hill, East Northamptonshir: эастон он т хилл, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy родился в 1450 г. в местности тоусестир, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Peter de Pierrepont Empson, Knight Sir было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Joseph, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane de Plumpton в 1462 г. в местности риттл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в 1442 году. Он умер 17 августа 1510 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности уитефрярс, Лондон, Англия.

es.Easton on the Hill, East Northamptonshir: Easton on the Hill, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy nació en 1450, en Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Peter de Pierrepont Empson, Knight Sir, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Joseph, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Jane de Plumpton en 1462, en Writtle, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1442. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1510, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Whitefriars, London, Inglaterra.
